title: BLACK+DECKER Portable Air Conditioner with Remote Control
summary: The BLACK+DECKER Portable Air Conditioner is a no-install cooling solution for rooms up to 250–350 sq ft. With LED display, remote control, and multiple fan/cooling modes, our research suggests it's one of the most practical portable AC units for apartments and rental spaces where window units aren't permitted.
pros: LED display with remote control included
Fan-only and dehumidifier modes in addition to cooling
Easy to move between rooms on rolling casters
cons: Less efficient than window AC units (single-hose design)
Exhaust hose must be vented through a window
Can be noisy at higher settings
Best suited for smaller rooms only
bestFor: Apartments where window AC units aren't allowed
Renters who want a portable cooling solution
verdict: For renters and apartment dwellers who need cooling without a permanent installation, the BLACK+DECKER portable AC is a reliable, well-designed solution. Our research confirms it delivers consistent cooling for rooms under 350 sq ft.
